files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "prometheus-9510-kubernetes-sd-optionally-attach-namespace-and-node-metadata-to-t",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "prometheus: Kubernetes SD: Optionally attach namespace and node metadata to targets",
+    "description": "Kubernetes SD: Optionally attach namespace and node metadata to targets. Requested by 18+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current prometheus deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your prometheus version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus\nhelm list -n prometheus 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working prometheus installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review prometheus configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant prometheus configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus\nkubectl get configmap -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=prometheus\n```\n## Proposal\nKubernetes SD should be extended so the service, pod, endpoints, and ingress roles can optionally attach extra meta labels based on the namespace and node objects that the targets are discovered in (where appropriate; ingress wouldn't"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Kubernetes SD: Optionally attach namespace and node…",
+        "description": "This PR implements part of the functionality suggested in https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/issues/9510.\n\nIn order to gather feedback and keep changes small, this commit only implements attaching metadata from nodes when the `pod` role is used for Kubernetes SD.\n```yaml\nattach_metadata:\n  # Attaches node metadata to discovered targets. Only valid for role: pod, endpoints. \n  # When set to true, Prometheus must have permissions to get Nodes. \n  [ node: <boolean> | default = false ]\n  # Attaches namespace metadata to discovered targets. Invalid for role: node.\n  # When set to true, Prometheus must have permissions to get Namespaces.\n  [ namespace: <boolean> | default = false ]\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus\nkubectl get events -n prometheus --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Kubernetes SD: Optionally attach namespace and node…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This PR implements part of the functionality suggested in https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/issues/9510.\n\nIn order to gather feedback and keep changes small, this commit only implements attaching metadata from nodes when the `pod` role is used for Kubernetes SD.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "attach_metadata:\n  # Attaches node metadata to discovered targets. Only valid for role: pod, endpoints. \n  # When set to true, Prometheus must have permissions to get Nodes. \n  [ node: <boolean> | default = false ]\n  # Attaches namespace metadata to discovered targets. Invalid for role: node.\n  # When set to true, Prometheus must have permissions to get Namespaces.\n  [ namespace: <boolean> | default = false ]"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {

+    ],

+    },
